body:
# This is Harmony Falls SMP Official Modpack!

This modpack specializes in optimizing and improving the minecraft client.

This modpack features some of the recent mod improvement mods for minecraft, while also having small mods to add some visual bloom.


A big thank you to Simply Optimized for being the base of this modpack!
Special Thanks to echoye for helping making the first versions of this modpack!
